# portkey_scim_workspace_mappings (Data Source)

Fetches Portkey SCIM workspace mappings, optionally filtered by workspace, SCIM group, or role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All mappings in the organization.
data "portkey_scim_workspace_mappings" "all" {}

# Mappings for one workspace.
data "portkey_scim_workspace_mappings" "example" {
  workspace_id = portkey_workspace.example.id
}

# All admin-role mappings.
data "portkey_scim_workspace_mappings" "admins" {
  role = "admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `role` (String) Filter mappings by role (admin, member, or manager).
- `scim_group_id` (String) Filter mappings by SCIM group ID.
- `workspace_id` (String) Filter mappings by workspace ID or slug.

### Read-Only

- `mappings` (Attributes List) List of SCIM workspace mappings matching the filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mappings))

<a id="nestedatt--mappings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mappings`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the mapping.
- `role` (String) Role assigned to group members in the workspace.
- `scim_group` (String) Display name of the SCIM group.
- `scim_group_id` (String) ID of the SCIM group.
- `workspace_id` (String) ID of the mapped workspace.
